base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_morph_ball_upgrade — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1986 metroid. Morph Ball (Maru Mari) — first key powerup. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Morph Ball (Maru Mari) — first key powerup; found in Brinstar. Enables ball-transformation
